FeatureName: Per-day GPT ranking and selection manifests
Description: Send all remaining day photos to GPT once, rank them with structured outputs, and persist per-day selection manifests for later trip-wide decisions.

Stories.StoryDescription: Construct one GPT request per day containing every post-dedup candidate photo for that day, with stable photo IDs and no cluster or representative metadata.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each day can produce a complete GPT request containing all remaining day photos exactly once for that run.

Stories.StoryDescription: Include the optional user preference prompt in the GPT request when configured, otherwise use the default diversity-first prompt.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The day-ranking request supports optional prompt preferences without requiring them.

Stories.StoryDescription: Parse GPT responses into a full ordered ranking of all day candidates plus per-photo scores, tags, rationale, and good-enough signals.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project can convert GPT responses into stable per-day ranking records for every day candidate.

Stories.StoryDescription: Write day_selection_manifest.json files containing ranked results, prompt metadata, and response metadata for each day.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each day produces a persisted selection manifest that can be reused later without resending images.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define failure handling for malformed responses, missing candidates, duplicate IDs, and partial rankings.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The day-ranking flow handles malformed GPT responses safely and deterministically.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add mocked tests for request construction, prompt behavior, response parsing, manifest writing, and rerun-stable ordering.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify the full per-day GPT ranking and manifest flow.
